3087000.name: Fulvinter
3087000.description:
Once upon a time, the magical lands of Ysslandril were a beautiful paradise, with golden beaches, proud mountains and almost perfect flowers… Until one day, the evil White Worm Fulvinter unleashed his icy breath, covering the land in eternal winter and drowning Ysslandrils magic.
Now, all hope is almost gone, but four brave heroes will spark it again. Armed with the hammer of seasons, they will embark on a journey to power it back and defeat the evil Fulvinter, bringing the immortal winter to an end.

ALONE, WITH A FRIEND, OR A TEAM OF FOUR

Save the land of Ysslandril by yourself, controlling two heroes to overcome challenges impossible for one, or invite a friend to collaborate in the quest. Use your partner to reach distant placers by throwing it away! But don’t worry, they’re tied to themselves for safety!
You can also team up for puzzles, dealing with enemies or solving puzzles to complete your quest of defeating the evil Fulvinter!
But if this seems a small challenge for you, another team can join you in an innovative mechanic of both cooperation and competition to see which are the best heroes!

CONTROL THE SEASONS TO OVERCOME PERILS

Unlock the true power of the Hammer of Seasons by recovering the powers of the seasons, and use them to advance in your quest. Starting with the ability of winter, throw ice blocks to damage enemies and create platforms.
Retrieve the powers of autumn, spring and summer and use different skills like floating platforms, shields, gliding and much more to fight your foes and complete puzzles.

AN EXPLORABLE WORLD

Explore the archipelago of Ysslandil and discover its different biomes, enemies and challenges. Discover the lands devastated by the immortal winter and retrieve its hidden power to restore the seasons!
Replay and revisit old levels with new powers to discover power ups, new secrets and hidden paths to new and redesigned levels.

FEATURES

  • 100+ levels divided in 4 distinct worlds, each with its own theme and challenges.
  • Unlock new and hidden levels by returning to previous levels with new powers!
  • Rewarding exploration with power-ups and abilities.
  • 12 different skills divided in the 4 seasons, each suited for a vital task to advance.
  • Up to 4 players, cooperating and competing at the same time for the glory and success!
  • 4 fearsome bosses, each inspired on legends of the Norse mythology, requiring both combat skill and puzzle solving to defeat them.
